ogTitle: Wilsons Plains vs Wilsonton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilsons Plains and Wilsonton.
heading: Wilsons Plains vs Wilsonton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilsons Plains, Queensland and Wilsonton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilsonton has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wilsons Plains (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilsons Plains or Wilsonton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilsons Plains has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Wilsonton scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilsons Plains scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Wilsonton scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilsons Plains or Wilsonton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilsonton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
